Smart Timelapse AI Slider

This repository contains the public website and documentation for Smart Timelapse AI Slider.
The public site is bilingual (Spanish and English):
- Spanish default layer: /
- English layer: /en/

The product landing is the main home page:
- ES landing: /
- EN landing: /en/

Main public pages:
- Hardware: /hardware/ and /en/hardware/
- Downloads: /downloads/ and /en/downloads/
- Support: /support/ and /en/support/
- Privacy policy: /privacy-policy/ and /en/privacy-policy/
- Terms: /terms/ and /en/terms/

This repo also includes open-source hardware resources and technical documentation (parts, GRBL references, printable files, assembly references).

Redirect-only routes (not independent landings):
- /smart-timelapse-ai/ redirects to /
- /en/smart-timelapse-ai/ redirects to /en/
